data.title: Dow Jones wavers at near record highs; Nvidia stock rises, bank stock soars. Live updates on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Friday saw the Dow Jones index hovering close to all-time highs while Nvidia stock regained a significant level. The stock market displayed uncertainty with the Dow and S&P showing inconsistent movement, while a bank stock surged. This information was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Fed may still cut rates in December despite pushback from Powell; S&P 500 fluctuates.
data.description: It was anticipated that there would be a Federal Reserve rate reduction and the cessation of quantitative tightening. However, the S&P 500 experienced a decline following Chairman Jerome Powell's statement. Despite Powell's resistance, it is still probable that a rate cut by the Federal Reserve will occur post-December. The S&P 500 showed wavering in response to this news.

data.title: CPI data shows low inflation, S&P 500 hits record. New vehicle prices unaffected by Trump tariffs. Fed may cut rates more.
data.description: The recent increase in vehicle prices has not been impacted by the tariffs imposed by the administration of Trump. A decline in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) indicates low inflation rates, allowing the Federal Reserve space for further interest rate reductions. The S&P 500 has achieved a record high.

data.title: ADP reports unexpected job loss due to government shutdown, leading to potential Fed rate cuts.
data.description: The upcoming ADP jobs report is gaining greater significance due to the possibility of a delay in the official jobs report caused by the government shutdown. The recently released ADP report revealed an unexpected decrease in jobs, prompting discussions about potential Federal Reserve rate cuts.

data.title: Fed's core PCE price index steady for August, supporting Fed rate cut outlook.
data.description: In August, the core PCE price index, which is the Federal Reserve's key inflation measure, remained stable. The data indicates that the inflation rate did not fluctuate significantly. This information supports the expectation for a potential interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve, as it aligns with their target for price stability. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the impact of the post PCE inflation data on the outlook for Fed's decision-making regarding interest rates.

data.title: Cobblestone Auto Spa hosts fundraiser for fallen officer's family on Jan 20 at Tempe location, offering 100% of single wash proceeds to support the family.
data.description: Cobblestone Auto Spa in Scottsdale, Arizona, will be hosting a fundraising event to support the family of fallen Detention Officer Lieutenant Rory Milligan. The event is scheduled for Tuesday, January 20, at the Tempe – Ray & Priest location from 7 AM to 3 PM, located at 9969 South Priest Drive, Tempe, AZ 85284. During this event, all proceeds from single washes (full service or express) at this location will go towards the cause. 100% of the earnings from each wash will be contributed to the fundraiser.

data.title: Trump announces "Great Healthcare Plan" focusing on lowering drug prices, premiums with key features like lock-in most-favored-nation drug pricing. White House aims to lessen Obamacare plan premiums by over 10% and emphasize cost relief. U.S.-Taiwan Chip Deal discussed.
data.description: A new healthcare framework named the "Great Healthcare Plan" has been introduced by Donald Trump, with the aim of reducing prescription drug prices and insurance premiums. This comes amidst issues in extending key Affordable Care Act tax credits in the Senate, potentially leading to higher premiums. The plan, focused on cost relief rather than boosting insurer subsidies, includes measures such as implementing most-favored-nation drug pricing, expanding direct-to-consumer discounted drug sales, and reallocating insurance funding to individuals instead of insurers. Additionally, cost-sharing reductions could result in reducing common Obamacare plan premiums by more than 10%, along with the enforcement of broader price-transparency regulations. The proposal is perceived as politically attractive, though its implementation remains uncertain. In other news, the U.S.-Taiwan chip deal has brought a reset in the trade relations.

data.title: Study by Catalight Research Institute suggests more treatment hours for autistic children don't always improve outcomes.
data.description: A recent study conducted by researchers at the Catalight Research Institute in Walnut Creek, California, suggests that increasing the number of treatment hours may not necessarily improve outcomes for autistic children. The study, published in a peer-reviewed journal on January 16, 2026, found that the traditional belief that more hours of treatment result in better outcomes may not hold true. The research challenges the existing notion and sheds light on a new perspective in the field of autism treatment. The study's data and analysis provide valuable insights for professionals and caregivers working with autistic children.

data.title: Sparx Hockey becomes official skate sharpener of U.S. Pond Hockey Championships, expanding partnership. Based in Acton, Mass.
data.description: A well-known skate sharpening brand, Sparx Hockey, has extended its longstanding partnership with the Pond Hockey Classic. This partnership expansion was revealed on January 16, 2026, in Acton, Massachusetts. Sparx Hockey is renowned for its automated skate sharpening equipment and continues to be a leader in the industry. The specific details regarding the expansion, including the duration and scope, were not disclosed in the release. This move highlights the commitment of both Sparx Hockey and the Pond Hockey Classic to furthering their collaboration and enhancing the quality of services provided to their customers.

data.title: Endeavour Silver corrects typographical error in 2026 guidance; AISC for Terronera remains unchanged.
data.description: A recent news release from Endeavour Silver Corp. dated January 16, 2026, has been re-filed on SEDAR due to a typographical error on page 3 regarding the AISC for Terronera. The consolidated AISC figure remains unchanged from the original report. This updated release serves to replace the initial version.

data.title: University of Phoenix and LinkedIn to host free webinar on AI in nursing on Jan 22, 2026. Practical guidance for nurses.
data.description: On January 22, a virtual event titled "AI in Action: Skills and Strategies for a New Era of Nursing" is scheduled to take place. During this event, valuable career-related advice will be shared with nurses on how to incorporate artificial intelligence into their work. The event will be hosted by University of Phoenix and LinkedIn. This webinar, set for January 22, 2026, will focus on practical strategies that nurses can immediately utilize. It is free to attend and will provide nurses with insights on how to leverage AI in their field.

data.title: Pet Flavors, LLC appoints Randolph Legg to Board alongside Fabian Kausche in a new chapter for the company.
data.description: A company based in Melbourne, Florida, Pet Flavors, LLC, announced on January 16, 2026, its plans to embark on a new phase. The company is known for producing high-quality flavor bases and palatants for chewable pharmaceuticals for pets. With a fresh vision and a revamped management team in place, Pet Flavors, LLC aims to steer the company towards a promising future.

data.title: Thyme&Table™ debuts Valentine's Day collection of drinkware and kitchen appliances for Walmart; includes charm glasses and tumblers.
data.description: Thyme&Table™, a prominent family-owned brand known for its stylish and high-performance homewares, has launched a new collection featuring a charming array of glasses, tumblers, and kitchen appliances. This lineup showcases a romantic and elegant color scheme with soft pinks, warm reds, and delicate heart-shaped accents. The release took place in New York on January 16, 2026.

data.title: Golden Gate Global raises over $1 billion in EB-5 capital, with $300 million in repayments to 600+ investors.
data.description: In SAN FRANCISCO, GGG has recently achieved a significant milestone by exceeding $1 billion in total capital raised through the EB-5 visa program. Additionally, they have surpassed $300 million in repayments to over 600 investors participating in the program.
Robinhood now offers prediction market 'Custom Combos,' appealing to customers interested in gambling in the stock market.

data.title: Flowtica, AI recording pen showcased at CES 2026, gains attention from media, investors, and industry.
data.description: In January 16, 2026, during CES 2026 in Las Vegas, Flowtica, an AI company from Singapore, may not have had the most attention-grabbing presence at the event. Despite this, the company managed to garner significant interest throughout the week from various stakeholders, including media, investors, and industry professionals.
